description: You are using Aerobridge, an open-source drone/UAV fleet management system (admin login: http://localhost:8000/admin/, username: admin, password: adminpass123). Onboard a new Indian drone services company by creating a Company record for 'BlueSky Robotics Pvt Ltd' (full name: 'BlueSky Robotics Pvt Ltd', common name: 'BlueSky', role: Operator, country: INDIA, email: 'info@bluesky.in', website: 'http://www.bluesky.in') and an associated Operator record (operator type: Non-LUC, authorized activities: 'photographing' and 'videotaping', operational authorizations: 'SORA').
